'''鈭歱-ng-f''' ('''pangafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quab|quab]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quab|quab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-ng-f
|-
! Lemma
| pangafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pangafithi|pangafithi]] || [[word:pangafiji|pangafiji]] || [[word:pangafishi|pangafishi]] || [[word:pangafi|pangafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pangafuthuth|pangafuthuth]] || [[word:pangafujuj|pangafujuj]] || [[word:pangafushush|pangafushush]] || [[word:pangaf|pangaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pangafuthu|pangafuthu]] || [[word:pangafuju|pangafuju]] || [[word:pangafushu|pangafushu]] || [[word:pangafu|pangafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pangafufuth|pangafufuth]] || [[word:pangafufuj|pangafufuj]] || [[word:pangafufush|pangafufush]] || [[word:pangafuf|pangafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pangafethe|pangafethe]] || [[word:pangafeje|pangafeje]] || [[word:pangafeshe|pangafeshe]] || [[word:pangafe|pangafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pangafothoth|pangafothoth]] || [[word:pangafojoj|pangafojoj]] || [[word:pangafoshosh|pangafoshosh]] || [[word:pangaf|pangaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pangafotho|pangafotho]] || [[word:pangafojo|pangafojo]] || [[word:pangafosho|pangafosho]] || [[word:pangafo|pangafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pangafofoth|pangafofoth]] || [[word:pangafofoj|pangafofoj]] || [[word:pangafofosh|pangafofosh]] || [[word:pangafof|pangafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pangaf忙th忙|pangaf忙th忙]] || [[word:pangaf忙j忙|pangaf忙j忙]] || [[word:pangaf忙sh忙|pangaf忙sh忙]] || [[word:pangaf忙|pangaf忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pangafathath|pangafathath]] || [[word:pangafajaj|pangafajaj]] || [[word:pangafashash|pangafashash]] || [[word:pangaf|pangaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pangafatha|pangafatha]] || [[word:pangafaja|pangafaja]] || [[word:pangafasha|pangafasha]] || [[word:pangafa|pangafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pangafafath|pangafafath]] || [[word:pangafafaj|pangafafaj]] || [[word:pangafafash|pangafafash]] || [[word:pangafaf|pangafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:pangafasha|pangafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopangafasha|gopangafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipangafasha|gokipangafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pangafn眉sha|pangafn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopangafnkn眉sha|gopangafnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipangafn眉sha|gokipangafn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pangafsh毛sha|pangafsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopangafnksh毛sha|gopangafnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipangafsh毛sha|gokipangafsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pangafrosha|pangafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopangafnkrosha|gopangafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipangafrosha|gokipangafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pangafmusha|pangafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopangafnkmusha|gopangafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipangafmusha|gokipangafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pangafsherasha|pangafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopangafnksherasha|gopangafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipangafsherasha|gokipangafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pangafngasha|pangafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopangafnkngasha|gopangafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipangafngasha|gokipangafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pangafyasha|pangafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopangafnkyasha|gopangafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipangafyasha|gokipangafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:pangafyamasha|pangafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopangafnkyamasha|gopangafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipangafyamasha|gokipangafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pangafn眉sh毛sha|pangafn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopangafnkn眉sh毛sha|gopangafnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipangafn眉sh毛sha|gokipangafn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pangafn眉rosha|pangafn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopangafnkn眉rosha|gopangafnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipangafn眉rosha|gokipangafn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pangafn眉musha|pangafn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopangafnkn眉musha|gopangafnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipangafn眉musha|gokipangafn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pangafsh毛n眉sha|pangafsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopangafnksh毛n眉sha|gopangafnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipangafsh毛n眉sha|gokipangafsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pangafsh毛rosha|pangafsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopangafnksh毛rosha|gopangafnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipangafsh毛rosha|gokipangafsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pangafsh毛musha|pangafsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopangafnksh毛musha|gopangafnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipangafsh毛musha|gokipangafsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:pangafron眉sha|pangafron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopangafnkron眉sha|gopangafnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipangafron眉sha|gokipangafron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pangafrosh毛sha|pangafrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopangafnkrosh毛sha|gopangafnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipangafrosh毛sha|gokipangafrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pangafromusha|pangafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopangafnkromusha|gopangafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipangafromusha|gokipangafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:pangafmun眉sha|pangafmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopangafnkmun眉sha|gopangafnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipangafmun眉sha|gokipangafmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:pangafmush毛sha|pangafmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopangafnkmush毛sha|gopangafnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipangafmush毛sha|gokipangafmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pangafmurosha|pangafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopangafnkmurosha|gopangafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipangafmurosha|gokipangafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pangaf|pangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙ng忙f|p忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopangaf|hopangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙ng忙f|hop忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopangaf|hohopangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙ng忙f|hohop忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉pangaf|n眉pangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙ng忙f|n眉p忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉pangaf|n眉n眉pangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙ng忙f|n眉n眉p忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂pangaf|n茂pangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙ng忙f|n茂p忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂pangaf|n茂n茂pangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙ng忙f|n茂n茂p忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupangaf|lupangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙ng忙f|lup忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupangaf|lulupangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙ng忙f|lulup忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipangaf|lipangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙ng忙f|lip忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipangaf|lilipangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙ng忙f|lilip忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopangaf|kopangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙ng忙f|kop忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopangaf|kokopangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙ng忙f|kokop忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepangaf|kepangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙ng忙f|kep忙ng忙f]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepangaf|kekepangaf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙ng忙f|kekep忙ng忙f]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
